name: [oss] koajs/koa PR #1930: add workflow_dispatch trigger to npm-publish workflow

source.title: chore: Add workflow_dispatch trigger to npm-publish workflow

notes: Adds a manual workflow_dispatch input (tag to checkout/publish) to the publish CI workflow; the checked-out ref comes from a maintainer-supplied input on a privileged workflow, not external PR input, so no untrusted-checkout regression. CI config, not app code.
